description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive combination of dark metal and wood components. The stock and handguard are made of polished wood, giving it a traditional appearance, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from blackened metal. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, a fixed wooden stock, and a standard-length barrel with a simple front sight post. The iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel, and the muzzle is fitted with a basic slant compensator or flash hider. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use in a variety of urban environments.
description: A traditional assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel end, front sight, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
